task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application is open and the dive list is populated. The window title or recent files list may indicate that /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf is loaded.
Dive #2 is highlighted or selected in the dive list. The dive details panel should display the date 'Dec 4, 2010' and location 'Sund Rock'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Equipment section for the selected dive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Equipment' tab is active in the lower dive details panel, displaying sections for Cylinders and Weight.

task_completion.description: Add a weight system with the type 'Integrated'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Weight section of the Equipment tab, a new entry is added with the Type or Description field explicitly set to 'Integrated'.

task_completion.description: Set the weight value to 4.5 kg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The weight value corresponding to the 'Integrated' weight system entry is set to '4.5' (with kg as the inferred or explicit unit).
The agent clicks 'Save' in the File menu, uses the Ctrl+S shortcut, or the window title no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (such as an asterisk).

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI to edit the dive log.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Subsurface application interface being used to make changes, rather than a text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) or terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent only modified the weight system for Dive #2.
integrity.visual_evidence: No other dives are selected for modification, and no other fields (like cylinders, dive profile, or notes) in Dive #2 are changed.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely saved the file to the correct location.
integrity.visual_evidence: A save action is visible (e.g., clicking File -> Save) and no 'Save As' to a different directory or filename is performed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating Dive #2 (Date: 2010-12-04, Location: Sund Rock) in the dive log at /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf. The expected weight system type is 'Integrated' and the weight is 4.5 kg (acceptable range 4.4 to 4.6 kg). The file must be saved back to the exact same path.
